title: crataegus oxyacantha var. typica
intro: Crataegus oxyacantha var. typica, also known as the common hawthorn, is a deciduous shrub or small tree species native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and cardiovascular protective effects. The health benefits of Crataegus oxyacantha var. typica include reducing high blood pressure, improving heart health, and providing antioxidant protection against oxidative stress. The herbal preparations of the plant include teas, capsules, and tinctures made from its leaves, flowers, and berries.
